title: Albie Dallemolle Named Vice President of Economic Development and Sustainability
summary: Albie Panikpaiq Dallemolle, a NANA shareholder from the community of Kiana, has been promoted to the position of vice president of economic development and sustainability for NANA. title: Let’s Go To The Hop!
summary: Join us on May 6 as we take a drive down memory lane for a 1950’s Sock Hop Fundraiser to benefit the Tribe’s Elder Emergency Fund. title: Stabilization Grants to Child Care Providers Available
summary: The American Rescue Plan Act was created to stabilize the child care market during and after the COVID-19 pandemic. The goal of the ARP Act is to continue access to affordable child care for families, and support child care facilities and employees, so they can continue to serve the community. This grant is specifically designed to support the supply of infant child care within the community. This sub-grant will be awarded to providers that currently offer infant care or are able to resume by Sept. 15, 2023. Eligible providers are able to apply to Kenaitze fo...
